message:
feat(builder): Add getBodyDupe() safe method for memory aliasing fix

The getBodyAndClear() method returns aliased memory that can cause
@memcpy panics when the buffer is reused before the caller finishes.

- Add getBodyDupe() that duplicates memory before clearing (safe)
- Migrate 15+ call sites in calls.zig to use getBodyDupe()
- Add builder helper functions in collections.zig and math.zig
